app.name: Time & Wealth
app.tagline: You’re not at work — you’re earning, every second.
app.microcalm: Slow breath in. Slow breath out. You’re making progress.
app.footer: Built as a local-only MVP. Want i18n, share cards, or desktop widgets next?

settings.countsNote: Counts from the moment you open. Data stays on this device.

goals.title: 🎯 Goal Planner
goals.subtitle: Turn desire into a plan: time-to-goal, daily pace, and an ETA.
goals.name: Name
goals.none: No goals in this category yet. Add one above.
goals.translationsHint: Fill in names for other languages (optional).

savings.title: 💰 Savings Plan
savings.subtitle: Set a target amount and a deadline. We’ll calculate how much to save per day/week/month.
savings.name: Goal name
savings.none: No savings goals yet. Create one above.

poster.title: One-click share poster
poster.hint: Click “Generate” first, then download or copy the image.
poster.clipboardNotSupported: Clipboard image copy isn’t supported in this browser. Please download instead.

pro.title: Pro membership
pro.mockNote: Note: This is a mock subscription for demo. We can connect Stripe / IAP later for real billing.
pro.reasonGoalsLimit: Free plan allows up to {{n}} goals. Upgrade to Pro to add more.
pro.reasonSavingsLimit: Free plan allows up to {{n}} savings goals. Upgrade to Pro to add more.
pro.reasonTranslate: Auto-translate is a Pro feature. Upgrade to use it.
pro.reasonWidget: Advanced desktop widget is a Pro feature. Upgrade to use it.
pro.reasonWage: After-tax / night / overtime wage calculation is a Pro feature.
pro.reasonCloud: Cloud sync & backup is a Pro feature.

cloud.title: Cloud sync / backup (Pro)
cloud.hint: Sign in with email to sync across phone & computer (auto backup).
cloud.notConfigured: Supabase isn’t configured. Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL / VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env.local and create the table in Supabase.
cloud.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent. Check your inbox to finish sign-in.

wage.todayHint: Estimated from the wage rules on the right (night: 22:00–05:00, overtime: > 8h).
wage.rulesHint: Hourly wage, schedule, multipliers. Default tax is 10.21%.

presets.downPayment: Down payment in a major city
